name: garyshi-skills
description: Gary Shi's personal Claude Code skills.

plugins.name: reflective-analysis
plugins.description: Orchestrated, staged, leaf-enforced reflective analysis for ambiguous, fast-moving, or strategically important questions.

plugins.name: rebase
plugins.description: Rebase the current Git branch onto a target branch, with upfront conflict analysis so an AI model can resolve conflicts by intent rather than guesswork.

plugins.name: render-claude-session
plugins.description: Save a readable transcript of the current Claude Code session to a Markdown or HTML file.
